search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results to lastzwiki.com and favored concrete guide pages over generic pages. Search terms surfaced a strong heroes page and a dedicated research/laboratory page, plus the English hub for navigation.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment catalog; useful for hero discovery, faction filtering, and gear cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero lists, tiers, and gear context for character research.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research tables by category with badge costs per level; useful for research discovery and cost cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Lookup research categories, names, and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English hub page linking to heroes, research, buildings, alliances, and beginner tips; good entry point for discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to relevant guide sections from a central index.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.last-z.wiki returned no indexed matches for the query. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.search_notes: Search limited to the approved domain returned no indexed results within the freshness window. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were returned by the search engine for the allowed domain.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Results centered on event/research/hero topics. No direct proof yet for exact mechanics beyond discovery leads.

results.title: Full Preparedness
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycles include an Age of Science theme for research actions and a Hero Initiative theme for hero upgrades.
results.primary_user_job: Map event windows and point sources for research and hero spending
claims_to_verify: Cycle order by day and hour
Point sources for hero upgrade tasks

results.title: Heroes
results.evidence_summary: Main hero roster page with hero classes and power factors; useful for linking hero upgrade mechanics to event scoring.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero categories and baseline hero systems tied to event mechanics
claims_to_verify: Which hero upgrades affect event points

results.title: Event Center
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events, helpful for locating event tabs and reset behavior.
results.primary_user_job: Find where events are grouped and how they reset

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.packsify.com as requested. No matching pages were found for the approved query, so no discovery leads could be returned.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on the allowed domain for the exact query.

search_records.search_notes: Focused on exact Last Z guide pages on the approved domain. Included only concrete guide/tool pages, not the homepage or generic marketing pages. Search also surfaced migration and alliance pages, but they were excluded because they are narrower or less directly useful for general mechanics discovery.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated guide for Shooter Camp unlocks, upgrades, training cap, and speed. Good evidence lead for troop-training building behavior.
results.primary_user_job: Verify Shooter Camp progression and training effects.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide focused on Laboratory function, research role, and unlocking a second Lab. Useful for tech-progression cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Verify research building roles and unlock path.

results.title: Last Z Formations Guide: Troop Capacity, Buffs & Levels - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide covering formations, troop capacity, combat buffs, and HQ-linked unlocks. Strong lead for march/combat capacity mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Verify formation capacity and buff mechanics.
